CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id INT, data LIST<INT>);
SELECT id FROM test_arrays WHERE array_pop_back(data) = [10, 20];
SELECT id, array_pop_back(data) AS modified_data FROM test_arrays WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_arrays WHERE array_pop_back(data) IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id FROM test_arrays WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_arrays WHERE array_pop_back(data) = []);
SELECT id, array_pop_back(data) AS last_element_removed FROM (SELECT id, data FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 2);
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_arrays WHERE array_pop_back(data) = (SELECT array_pop_back(d.data) FROM test_arrays d WHERE d.id = 1);
CREATE TABLE test_metadata (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description STRING);
INSERT INTO test_metadata VALUES (1, 'Test case for single element array'), (2, 'Test case for empty array');
SELECT tm.id, array_pop_back(t.data) AS modified_data FROM test_arrays t JOIN test_metadata tm ON t.id = tm.id WHERE tm.id = 1;
